intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely unsupported by the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) is the only pot showing a clear, albeit struggling, biological presence.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos specimen identified by the white rabbit anchor.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in the shared black pot.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no growth detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no growth detected.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos shows a single, thin, green stem/leaf structure. The specimen appears etiolated and lacks vigor.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no growth detected.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Soil appears dark and potentially over-saturated or compacted.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments are present on the surface of P3, serving as a calcium amendment or mulch intervention.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant biological growth outside of the pots.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-4: Minimal change; P3 shows a slight shift in the angle of the stem.
temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: Stable; no visible growth or decline.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Lighting conditions darkened; structural integrity of the P3 stem remains consistent.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Return of visibility; P3 stem appears slightly more curved.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Significant loss of visibility due to low light; P3 stem remains in the same position.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical decline. P3 is the only surviving occupant and exhibits signs of severe light deprivation (etiolation). The lack of growth in P1, P2, and P4 suggests either total mortality or a failure to germinate/establish.
anomalies: Absence of registered flora in P1, P2, and P4 (Systemic Loss)
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is currently failing. Only one specimen (P3) remains visible, and it is in a weakened, etiolated state. The other pots are devoid of visible plant life, indicating a systemic failure of the biome. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil enrichment, but the lack of light and potential over-saturation of the soil are likely inhibiting recovery.
